title: Light Garlicky Ackee Stir-fry
description: An energizing and light dish featuring ackee mixed with dumplings (likely plantains or bananas), garlic, and other aromatic vegetables for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 2 fresh ackee fruits
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are safe to eat and prepared properly

ingredients.name: 1 cup diced dumplings (banana or plantain)
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe, fresh ones if using banana or ensure the correct kind if using plantain

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon olive oil or vegan alternative

instructions: Wash ackee under running water and remove any outer skin. Dice the dumplings.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Add diced ackee, dumplings, and chopped bell pepper to the pan. Season with salt.
Stir-fry everything together for about 3-5 minutes until vegetables are tender and flavors meld together.
Garnish with julienned cucumber if using, then serve hot as a light meal or snack.
